hooks.name: block-pci-data
hooks.description: Block writes containing raw PAN, CVV, track data, or PIN block patterns

hooks.name: lint-php-on-save
hooks.description: Run Laravel Pint on PHP files after write

hooks.name: lint-go-on-save
hooks.description: Run gofmt on Go files after write

hooks.name: lint-js-on-save
hooks.description: Run ESLint on JS/TS/Vue files after write
